title: Annual Review Procedure
description: Step-by-step procedure for conducting the annual policy review cycle in LogicGate, including owner responsibilities, timelines, and approval routing.

title: Compliance Document Management Procedure
description: How to create, version, and manage compliance documents within LogicGate, including document lifecycle stages and required metadata.

title: Compliance Policy Governance Approval Processes Procedure
description: Governance approval workflows in LogicGate — how policies move through board, committee, and owner approval stages.

title: Compliance Policy Exception Management Procedure
description: How to submit, track, and resolve policy exceptions and due date extensions in LogicGate.

title: Desktop Procedure: Document Update and Approval Workflow
description: Step-by-step desktop procedure for updating a document and routing it through the approval workflow in LogicGate.

title: Desktop Procedure: Extension Workflow
description: Step-by-step desktop procedure for submitting a due date extension request and the Central Team review and approval workflow in LogicGate.

title: Desktop Procedure: Exception Workflow
description: Step-by-step desktop procedure for submitting a policy exception request and the Central Team review and approval workflow in LogicGate.

title: LogicGate Training Guide
description: Comprehensive training guide covering all LogicGate roles and workflows: submitting new document requests, drafting and updating documents, approval routing, requesting extensions, exceptions, and retirements.
